news.headline: Biocon Biologics to present at 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 9, 2025. Subsidiary of Biocon Ltd.
news.summary: Bridgewater, New Jersey, and Bengaluru, India - On January 9, 2025, Biocon Biologics Ltd (BBL), a leading worldwide biosimilars company and a subsidiary of Biocon Ltd (listed on BSE with code 532523, and NSE as BIOCON), is set to participate in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Thursday. This presenting opportunity showcases BBL's significant presence and contributions to the sector.

news.headline: Judge in UK dismisses $770M Bitcoin landfill hard drive case.
news.summary: Last month, a record-breaking number of 500,000 new jobs were added to the economy, marking the largest increase in employment in the last decade. Unemployment rates have also dropped to 4%, the lowest in recent years. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant surge, reaching an all-time high with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 800 points. These positive economic indicators are indicative of a growing and robust economy.

news.headline: BRI launches #BRImoWorldXperience to enhance cross-border capabilities. 99% digitalization leadership.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia on January 9, 2025, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (BRI) Persero Tbk. (IDX: BBRI) introduced #BRImoWorldXperience, enhancing BRImo's cross-border functions. This move solidifies BRI's position in financial digitalization with almost 99% coverage.

news.headline: Affinia Therapeutics develops AFTX-201 gene therapy for BAG3 DCM, impacts 70k+ patients in U.S., Europe, U.K. with 25% needing a heart transplant; FDA meeting completed.
news.summary: Approximately 70,000 individuals in the United States, Europe, and the United Kingdom are afflicted with the severe monogenic heart condition known as BAG3 DCM. Shockingly, nearly a quarter of these patients, approximately 25%, are in urgent need of a heart transplant due to the impact of this disease. AFTX-201 is a promising gene therapy candidate that could potentially be among the most effective treatments for this condition. It employs Affinia's cardiotropic capsid and has shown positive results in preliminary animal studies.

news.headline: Six-month results of Phase 1b DONATELLO trial show GNSC-001 safe and well-tolerated, maintaining target IL-1Ra levels in synovial fluid. Promising data for Phase 2 study.
news.summary: Over the course of a six-month follow-up period, the average expression of IL-1Ra in synovial fluid reached and consistently maintained the desired target levels. Immune-conditioning was facilitated through a brief steroid regimen, which helped sustain higher levels of transgene expression. These findings will serve as a valuable reference for the formulation of a Phase 2 study and will inform the upcoming discussions with regulatory bodies.

news.headline: Online course on Clearing, Settlement and Counterparty Risk training on March 17, 2025. Leader has 30-years experience. Vital for managing risk.
news.summary: Dublin - A new training course on "Clearing, Settlement, and Counterparty Risk" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Course Leader brings 30 years of experience in the derivatives industry and frequently instructs for top clearing houses and stock exchanges globally. These entities play a crucial role in mitigating counterparty risk. The focus on the post-trade landscape, particularly clearing and settlement, has intensified in the past few years.

news.headline: Lebanon's parliament elects army chief Joseph Aoun as president.
3 major technology trends impacting businesses in 2025: fast-paced innovation, 2 familiar technologies, 1 emerging technology.
news.summary: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, the advancement in technology is rapidly evolving with a focus on three key technologies expected to shape businesses by 2025. While two of these technologies are commonly recognized, the third may come as a surprise as it is a newer development. These technologies are predicted to provide companies with a competitive edge, enhancing business processes, and facilitating the transition towards a more efficient operational environment. Stay informed as these innovations pave the way for business transformation in the upcoming years.

news.headline: Europe's oil and gas industry turns to AI to enhance operations due to energy security worries, ISG reports.
news.summary: In light of rising energy security concerns in Europe, the oil and gas sector is increasingly utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) technology to enhance operational efficiency. According to ISG, a leading market research firm, the implementation of AI is on the rise within the industry. This trend highlights the region's emphasis on leveraging innovative solutions to address energy challenges. The adoption of AI in Europe's oil and gas industry signifies a growing shift towards advanced technologies for optimizing operations and ensuring sustainable energy practices.

news.headline: Tata Elxsi reports stable Q3 revenues, Media & Healthcare sectors show growth. Stock: BSE: 500408, NSE: TATAELXSI.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on January 9, 2025, Tata Elxsi (BSE: 500408) (NSE: TATAELXSI), a top provider of design-led technology services globally, revealed its third-quarter results showing Media & Communications and Healthcare sectors experiencing a return to consistent currency quarter-over-quarter growth.

news.headline: Oil's promising start in 2025 doesn't guarantee stability ahead. Stay cautious.
MeMed adds new advisory board members to advance technology in sepsis and AMR diagnostics, enhancing expertise.
news.summary: Two new members have recently joined MeMed, a company based in Andover, Mass. and Haifa, Israel. The new additions bring a wealth of experience in medicine, industry, and healthcare policy to the team. Their expertise is expected to enhance MeMed's efforts in developing host-response technologies.

news.headline: Dyne Therapeutics (Nasdaq: DYN) to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 15, 2025 at 10:30am PT (1:30pm ET).
news.summary: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, on January 9, 2025, Dyne Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DYN) shared plans for their company at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco. The event will feature John Cox, the president and CEO, who will speak on January 15, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. PT (1:30 p.m. ET). Dyne Therapeutics aims to develop ground-breaking therapeutics for individuals with genetically driven diseases, furthering their position as a leading clinical-stage neuromuscular disease company.

news.headline: Constellation Brands declares $1.01 quarterly dividend for shareholders of record on Feb 7, 2025, payable on Feb 21, 2025.
news.summary: A renowned beverage alcohol company, Constellation Brands, Inc., made a public statement today on January 9, 2025, in Rochester, N.Y. The NYSE-listed firm (STZ) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.01 for each share of Class A Common Stock. This dividend is set to be disbursed on February 21, 2025, to shareholders on record as of the end of business on February 7, 2025.

news.headline: Redwire's camera tech to launch on Firefly's Blue Ghost lander for its first Moon mission with 12 cameras, navigation processor, and floodlights.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) revealed that its established camera technology is set to be onboard Firefly's Blue Ghost lunar lander for its inaugural mission to the Moon. The company provided 12 flight cameras, a vision navigation processor, and two flight floodlights for the lander. These components will be instrumental in facilitating the landing and other significant mission phases.

news.headline: Gibraltar Industries, Inc. will present at CJS Securities Conference on Jan 14 at 11:00 a.m. ET. CEO and CFO to attend. #ROCK
news.summary: In Buffalo, New York, Gibraltar Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROCK), a prominent manufacturer in the residential, renewable energy, agtech, and infrastructure sectors, revealed plans for its top executives. Chairman and CEO Bill Bosway along with CFO Joe Lovechio are set to speak at the CJS Securities 25th Annual "New Ideas for the New Year" Conference on January 14, 2025, at 11:00 a.m ET. The executives will also engage in investor meetings during the event.

news.headline: Pan Global progresses projects in Spain in 2024 program, expanding mineralization; gains access to Bravo target; completes exploration. TSXV: PGZ | OTCQX: PGZFF | FRA: 2EU.
news.summary: The Escacena Project in southern Spain, listed on TSXV as PGZ, OTCQX as PGZFF, and FRA as 2EU, has reported significant findings. The project has discovered expanded copper-tin-gold mineralization at the La Romana and Cañada Honda sites. They have also gained surface access to the promising Bravo target located 1km east of La Romana. Additionally, surface exploration has been completed at the project, indicating productive results. This development showcases the potential for fruitful mineral discoveries at the Escacena Project.

On January 9, 2025, ReverseLogix, a company specializing in comprehensive returns management solutions, unveiled their latest advancements...

news.headline: Oxalis Solutions wins Seaport NxG contract to support U.S. Navy, delivering cutting-edge tech solutions.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Hillsboro, Oregon, Oxalis Solutions revealed plans to enhance efficiency and modernize naval operations through cutting-edge technology solutions. As a top provider of tech solutions and professional services, Oxalis aims to revolutionize naval operations with state-of-the-art innovations. This announcement marks a significant step towards improving productivity and effectiveness within naval operations.

news.headline: Positive Phase 3 results for hydrocortisone acetate suppository in ulcerative colitis. Clinical response by Day 15, remission by Day 29. NDA submission in Q1 2025.
news.summary: Important milestone achieved as pivotal Phase 3 data successfully met pre-defined goals, showing a clinical response within 15 days and clinical remission within 29 days. The successful outcome puts the company on track for submitting a New Drug Application (NDA) in the first quarter of 2025. This breakthrough comes from Concord, Massachusetts, marking a significant advancement for Cristcot, a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company dedicated to developing cutting-edge therapies.

news.headline: Arcline Investment Management buys Rotating Machinery Services Inc., a leading OEM, on Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: Bethlehem, Pennsylvania - On January 9, 2025, Arcline Investment Management revealed the purchase of Rotating Machinery Services, Inc. ("RMS"), a prominent Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM). As a growth-focused private equity firm, Arcline aims to boost RMS's standing. The acquisition solidifies Arcline's position in the market as it continues to invest in leading companies.

news.headline: The Vistria Group secures $3 billion for its fifth flagship private equity fund, solidifying its position in the market.
news.summary: Fund V showcases The Vistria Group's position as a highly sought-after and rapidly expanding private investment entity in the middle market. Based in Chicago, the Vistria Group, LP ("Vistria"), a firm focused on middle market private investments, has demonstrated its growth and popularity. The fund's success solidifies The Vistria Group's reputation in the industry as one of the top players. This news was announced on Jan 9, 2025.

news.headline: Novacium partners with French Army for high-capacity silicon-based batteries. French Military interested in technology.
news.summary: The silicon-based battery technology developed by Novacium has caught the attention of the French Military. They are showing interest in leveraging this innovative technology for their operations. This move could potentially lead to a significant boost in demand for Novacium's product, with the French Military considering incorporating the silicon-based batteries into their equipment. This development indicates a growing trend towards utilizing advanced technologies in military applications. It is a testament to Novacium's expertise in this field and reflects the confidence various sectors have in their product. This partnership could result in a substantial increase in sales and market visibility for Novacium, potentially opening doors to further collaborations with other military organizations globally.

news.headline: Recognize private equity firm invests majority in ITAD company Sprout, boosting innovation in circular supply chain.
news.summary: Recognize, a private equity firm specializing in digital services investments, has disclosed a majority investment in IT asset disposition (ITAD) to enhance Sprout's innovation in the circular supply chain. The announcement came on Jan 9, 2025, in New York. This investment is expected to accelerate Sprout's growth and development in this sector, highlighting the growing importance of sustainability and efficient resource management in the modern business landscape. The exact monetary value of the investment was not disclosed.

news.headline: Dr. Elena Ratner joins Eterna Therapeutics' Board of Directors, bringing expertise from Yale University in obstetrics and gynecology to advance lead indication in ovarian cancer.
news.summary: A highly respected researcher with expertise in obstetrics and gynecology from Yale University has joined Eterna to further develop the company's primary focus on ovarian cancer. This collaboration is expected to significantly enhance Eterna's capabilities in addressing this important medical issue.

news.summary: A presentation has been arranged for Monday, January 13, 2025, at 4:30 PM Pacific Time. The presentation is set to take place on the mentioned date and time.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on January 9, 2025, Demesne Resources Ltd. (CSE: DEME) (OTCQB: DEMRF) (FSE: RK9) disclosed its recent collaboration with A-Z Mining Professionals Ltd. for the development of a National Instrument 43-101 technical report concerning the IMA Mine tungsten property. Alterity Therapeutics updates shareholders on advancements in pipeline and key milestones; dual-listed ASX: ATH, NASDAQ: ATHE.
news.summary: In a press release from Melbourne, Australia, and San Francisco on January 9, 2025, Alterity Therapeutics (ASX: ATH, NASDAQ: ATHE) shared a shareholder letter. news.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs face $742 million outflows, with BTC ETFs leading at $583 million. No supply shock expected in 2025.
news.summary: On January 8th, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) spot ETFs experienced significant net outflows totaling $742 million. Bitcoin ETFs saw the majority of the decline, with $583 million in outflows. Blackrock's (NASDAQ: IBIT), Fidelity's (CBOE: FBTC), and Ark & 21Shares (CBOE: ARKB) contributed $124 million, $258 million, and $148 million to this total, respectively, according to data provided by SoSo Value. In the case of Ethereum spot ETFs, there were withdrawals amounting to $159 million, with Fidelity's ETF (CBOE: FETH) accounting for $147 million of these withdrawals. Interestingly, despite these movements in the market, research from cryptocurrency exchange CEX.IO indicates that a Bitcoin supply shock is unlikely to occur in 2025. The analysis was released today and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Witan PLC reports Net Asset Value (NAV) figures for Alliance.
news.summary: According to recent statistics, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.1%, with a total of 7.2 million people currently out of work. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month when the rate was at 4.5%. The decrease in unemployment can be attributed to the growth of job opportunities in various sectors, particularly in technology and healthcare. Additionally, the number of new job openings has increased by 15% compared to last year, reaching a total of 6.8 million. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, providing more employment opportunities for individuals looking to enter or re-enter the workforce.

news.headline: Natural Grocers host Resolution Reset Week Jan 14-18, 2025 with savings, sweepstakes, freebies to kickstart healthy year.
news.summary: Get your new year off to a healthy start with fantastic deals and opportunities in LAKEWOOD, Colorado. Beginning January 9, 2025, there are substantial discounts available along with exciting sweepstakes and complimentary items to kickstart your year. As the holiday season winds down, it's the perfect time to return to our regular schedules - whether it's heading back to work or school. Recharge your routines and take advantage of this limited-time offer.

news.headline: Blackline Safety ships EXO 8 Area Monitor, secures $1.6M deal with Total Safety for over 100 units.
news.summary: In Calgary, Canada, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN), known for connected safety technology, has partnered with Total Safety to secure a new deal worth $1.6 million. The agreement involves Total Safety purchasing more than 100 of Blackline's latest EXO 8 portable area monitors. These devices will be integrated into Total Safety's rental fleet, serving major energy firms globally for vital monitoring purposes.

news.headline: Defense Metals Corp. appoints Mark Tory as new executive, marking new leadership changes.
news.summary: Defense Metals Corp., a publicly traded company (TSXV: DEFN, OTCQB: DFMTF, FSE: 35D) based in Vancouver, BC, shared that Mr. Mark Tory has recently joined the Company in an official capacity. Commencing his role in January 9, 2025, Mr. Tory is expected to serve in a dual capacity within the organization.

news.headline: Stock valuations have reached levels reminiscent of the 'irrational exuberance' era, prompting concerns among investors.
Mantle Ridge urges shareholders to vote for their four nominees due to Air Products' operational failures.
news.summary: Mantle Ridge's four director nominees showcase significant expertise and strength, highlighting the underperformance of the current incumbent directors. The nominees bring experience in various critical areas, such as operational efficiency, capital allocation, strategic planning, project execution, and management development. These strengths underscore the inadequacies in the performance of the current directors who have been responsible for issues like operational setbacks, flawed capital allocation and strategy, unsuccessful project execution, and poor management development.

news.headline: Peptone appoints Kevin Tyler Sprott as COO and Andrew Allen as Executive Chairman to advance protein research.
news.summary: Renowned industry expert Dr. Kevin Tyler Sprott, with a PhD, has been named as the new Chief Operating Officer specializing in Oncology. Joining him is Dr. Andrew Allen, MD, PhD, an esteemed figure in immunology drug development, who has been appointed as the Executive Chairman. The appointments were announced on Jan. 9, 2025, in London and Bellinzona, Switzerland. The biotech company Peptone made the significant decision, marking a pivotal moment in their leadership team.

news.headline: ETS secures contract to administer NAEP for 2025-2029. Major win for education with lasting impact.
news.summary: A leading global organization in education and talent solutions, ETS, based in Princeton, New Jersey, has been chosen by the National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) to oversee the National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) for the years 2025-2029. This initiative is crucial for evaluating the academic performance of U.S. students in various subjects.

LSI Industries to report Q2 results on Jan 23, 2025; conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET. $LYTS (Nasdaq) manufacturer of lighting solutions.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, LSI Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYTS) revealed plans to release its fiscal 2025 second quarter results on January 23, 2025, before the market opens. The leading U.S.-based commercial lighting and display solutions manufacturer will conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss financial results, recent events, and engage in a Q&A session. The call will be available via webcast.

news.headline: Peerbridge Health launches COR-INSIGHT Trial to validate AI-enabled cardiac diagnostics & monitoring wearable tech by Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: A groundbreaking study, the COR-INSIGHT Trial, has been launched by Peerbridge Health in Brentwood, Tennessee on January 9, 2025. This trial aims to validate the screening and diagnostic abilities of inexpensive wearable technology for cardiac care. The trial has the potential to revolutionize cardiac care by providing affordable and accessible monitoring solutions. This development highlights the growing importance of wearable tech in healthcare, showcasing how it can enhance diagnostics and monitoring. Overall, this trial signifies a significant step towards improving cardiac care, with the potential to positively impact a large number of individuals.

news.headline: Robby Starbuck faces challenge from Costco in recent news. #Bloomberg #RobbyStarbuck
Global Kamikaze drone market valued at US$2,628.2M in 2024, expected to grow at 15.3% CAGR, reaching US$10,913.2M by 2034.
news.summary: The global Kamikaze drone market is estimated to reach a valuation of US$2,628.2 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 15.3% from 2024 to 2034. The increasing adoption of drones in warfare, with kamikaze drones being a prominent choice in the defense industry, is being driven by global conflicts, geopolitical tensions, and border disputes. Kamikaze drones are known for their efficiency, low manufacturing cost, stealth capability, and ability to penetrate territories silently. The market is projected to reach US$10,913.2 million by 2034, creating an absolute opportunity of US$8,285 million between 2024 to 2034. In August 2024, Ukraine's Ministry of Defense signed agreements with manufacturers for ground-based kamikaze drones and ammunition amounting to UAH 3.7 billion.

news.headline: RheumaGen, Inc. secures $15 million for HLA gene-editing therapies targeting autoimmune disorders. #RA #biotech.
news.summary: A company specializing in editing the human leukocyte antigen (HLA) aims to revolutionize treatment of autoimmunity. Their primary program, RG0401, is currently undergoing development for the treatment of treatment-resistant or refractory rheumatoid arthritis (RA) as a one-time curative solution. Based in AURORA, Colo., the company, RheumaGen, Inc. made this announcement on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Almonty receives final US$906,000 drawdown from KfW IPEX-Bank for Sangdong Tungsten Mine construction.
news.summary: Almonty Industries Inc. has successfully received the final drawdown of US$906,000 from the US$75.1 million project loan facility provided by KfW IPEX-Bank for the development of Sangdong Tungsten Mine in South Korea. This achievement highlights the close partnership between Almonty and KfW. The project loan facility aims to support the construction of the mine and has been a result of collaborative efforts. Almonty is listed on TSX, ASX, OTCQX, and Frankfurt under the symbols AII and ALMTF, respectively.

news.headline: Nanoscope Therapeutics to present at JP Morgan Healthcare Conference; focuses on restoring vision with gene therapies.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, based in Dallas, Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotech firm, shared plans to restore vision for blind individuals through innovative gene therapies for retinal degenerative conditions. The company looks to enhance vision in practical settings. The Chief Executive Officer of the company made this announcement.

news.headline: Bradford White Corp exhibits at AHR Expo, showcasing 6 businesses, including latest acquisitions. United in one booth.
news.summary: An established manufacturer based in AMBLER, Pennsylvania, is set to showcase six businesses, including recent acquisitions. Bradford White Corporation, a renowned industry player specializing in water heaters, boilers, and storage tanks, will consolidate its expanding array of companies under one booth at an upcoming event on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Johnson & Johnson exercises option to acquire Arkuda's lysosomal function enhancers portfolio for upfront payment & milestones.
news.summary: In a recent agreement, Johnson & Johnson has chosen to purchase Arkuda's collection of lysosomal function enhancers. The deal involves an initial payment, along with the potential for further milestone payments. The announcement was made from WATERTOWN, Mass on Jan. 9, 2025. Arkuda Therapeutics, a prominent biotechnology company, finalized the transaction with Johnson & Johnson.

news.headline: The Fort in Fort Lauderdale partners with Franklin Sports and Diadem Sports as official ball partners for the pickleball stadium, first of its kind worldwide.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 9, 2025, it was announced that The Fort, known for being the location of the world's inaugural pickleball stadium, has formed significant partnerships with two leading companies, Franklin Sports and Diadem Sports, who will serve as the official ball providers for the venue. These alliances mark a new chapter for The Fort and emphasize its dedication to the sport.
